💗

A message from my heart

Forgive me,
Baby ♥

I know I made you wait. I know I hurt you. But everything I feel for you now is real — and I mean every word.

↓ keep scrolling ↓

❧ with all my love ❧
My dearest baby,

I still remember the day you proposed to me. You were so brave — braver than I ever was. And I didn't deserve that courage, because I wasn't ready. I hurt you without even realising how much.

I was a fool. I let time pass, I let moments slip, and I let you wonder if you meant something to me. You did. You always did — I just didn't know how to feel it yet.

But now? Now I feel it every single day. When I wake up, when I laugh at something stupid, when the world feels heavy — you are the one I think of. You are the one I want.

I know I made mistakes. I know you're taking your time, and that's okay. You deserve to take all the time you need. I'll be right here — patient, certain, and completely yours.

I'm sorry for every moment I made you doubt yourself. I'm sorry for not seeing you sooner. And I am so, so grateful that you still give me the chance to show you how much I mean it now.

These photos we have together — they remind me of every reason why I fall harder every day. Look at us. Look at how beautiful this is.

Forgive me, baby. I love you. ♥

— Forever yours 💕
✿ our memories ✿

Every moment with you is
a treasure

our little story, in pictures ♥

💕 💗 💕

"I choose you. And I'll choose you over and over. Without pause, without a doubt, in a heartbeat."

— always, your love ♥
